tldr: Burlington's Committee of the Whole met over two days to address multiple development applications, approve budgets for business improvement areas, and make decisions on golf course operations and Canada Day celebrations. The meeting included significant discussion of a proposed merger between Tourism Burlington and Burlington Economic Development.

items.title: Red Tape Red Carpet update Q1 2024
items.notes: Directed semi-annual reporting to Pipeline to Permit Committee on progress for cutting red tape and investment facilitation.

items.title: Downtown parking operational changes
items.notes: Approved by-law amendments to transportation services by-law for downtown parking operations.

items.title: 2024 Burlington Downtown BIA budget and tax levy
items.notes: Approved $1,012,000 levy for Burlington Downtown Business Improvement Area 2024 budget.

items.title: 2024 Aldershot Village BIA budget and tax levy
items.notes: Approved $276,000 levy for Aldershot Village Business Improvement Area 2024 budget.

items.title: Operating budget performance report December 31, 2023
items.notes: Received year-end financial position report and directed allocation of 2023 retained savings.

items.title: Appointment of Deputy City Clerks
items.notes: Approved by-law amendment for appointment of Deputy City Clerks.

items.title: Housing Accelerator Fund implementation
items.notes: Received update on progress toward implementing the City's Housing Accelerator Fund Action Plan.

items.title: 1200 King Road vision update
items.notes: Directed staff to report back in Q2 2024 on future investment opportunities including detailed public presentation from Alinea and Letter of Intent.

items.title: Burlington Performing Arts Centre governance review update
items.notes: Received and filed updated information on the Burlington Performing Arts Centre governance review.

items.title: Motion regarding local board governance merger
items.notes: Directed merger of Tourism Burlington with Burlington Economic Development by January 1, 2025, with $50,000 allocated for external expertise.

items.title: Regional review update
items.notes: Received update on regional CAO's service review process and directed further update to Council with prioritization recommendations.

items.title: Strategic Real Estate Acquisition Policy
items.notes: Approved new policy for strategic real estate acquisition and partnership opportunities including surplus school sites monitoring.

items.title: Ward Boundary Review
items.notes: Approved Option 2 for Council Composition and Ward Boundary Review with $220,000 expenditure from Election Reserve Fund.

items.title: Tyandaga Golf Course evolution recommendations
items.notes: Directed retention of 18-hole course with 5% surcharge through 2025 budget to contribute to new Reserve Fund for future enhancements.

items.title: Canada Day fireworks and drone display
items.notes: Approved pilot drone display supplement for 2024 Canada Day Festival at $15,000 from reserve funds and continued 2023 fireworks decision process.

items.title: BurlingtonGreen fee for services
items.notes: Approved $50,000 one-time funding from Green Initiatives Reserve Fund for BurlingtonGreen services and directed report on lease payment waiver.

items.title: Solar eclipse event April 8, 2024
items.notes: Directed public viewing event at Spencer Smith Park and Committee meeting recess from 2:30-3:45 p.m. on eclipse day.

items.title: Burlington solar incentive pilot program
items.notes: Approved one-year pilot program covering building permit costs for solar system installations.

items.title: Better Homes Burlington Program Special Charge
items.notes: Approved by-law to authorize imposition of special charge under the Better Homes Burlington Program.

items.title: Post-secondary attraction strategy update
items.notes: Requested Burlington Economic Development report back on developing partnerships and updated strategy aligned with Vision 2050.

items.title: Official Plan and Zoning amendments for 1120 Cooke Boulevard
items.notes: Approved mixed-use development with three tall buildings of 34, 32, and 30 storeys maximum heights.

items.title: Regional Allocation Program update
items.notes: Confirmed prioritization of property-based requests and authorized minor adjustments during agreement process.

items.title: Bill 162 Get it Done Act 2024 update
items.notes: Received and filed update regarding provincial Bill 162 legislation.

items.title: Graphic Image Delivery By-law
items.notes: Approved by-law requiring distribution of graphic images to be enclosed in envelopes or packages.

items.title: City-initiated Official Plan housekeeping amendments
items.notes: Approved Official Plan Amendment No. 141 for housekeeping amendments after statutory public meeting.

items.title: Zoning By-law amendment for multi-unit business park parking
items.notes: Approved amendments to Zoning By-law 2020 for parking requirements in multi-unit business parks after public meeting.

items.title: Official Plan and Zoning amendments for 1026 Cooke Boulevard
items.notes: Referred development application to March 19, 2024 Council meeting after statutory public meeting.

deferred: Official Plan and Zoning amendments for 1026 Cooke Boulevard
